//: Typechecks src INCLUDING *.test.ts (F-9b3e21fa). The build tsconfig excludes tests, `npm test` (vitest/esbuild) transpiles without typechecking, and the root `tsc --noEmit` resolves zero files — so a required-parameter signature change silently degraded a test to a 2-arg call (TS2554) without failing any gate. Run: npx tsc -p packages/equipment/tsconfig.test.json
